summary: Added a pin hygiene shell check for native tool selectors and GitHub workflow action refs, exposed it as a just target, and wired it into just check.

acceptanceEvidence.evidence: evidence/m4-pin-hygiene-check/commands.log records temporary negative smoke tests for `latest` and `stable` failing as expected.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: GitHub workflow uses refs reject main/master/latest and major-only @vN tags for external actions.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: evidence/m4-pin-hygiene-check/commands.log records a temporary negative smoke test for `uses: actions/checkout@v4` failing as expected.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Full semver action tags and SHA refs are accepted.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: evidence/m4-pin-hygiene-check/commands.log records `nix develop -c just pin-hygiene-check` passing with current full semver action refs and a temporary commit SHA ref smoke test passing.
evidence/m4-pin-hygiene-check/commands.log records a temporary positive smoke test with `uses: ./actions/local` passing.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: just pin-hygiene-check and just check pass.
Evidence and qd reports are recorded.
No product runtime, cross-device, or related claims are made.

commandsRun.command: temporary negative smoke tests for latest/stable/@v4
temporary positive smoke test for commit SHA and local action refs

realWorldValidation.evidence: Repository hygiene gate only; no product runtime validation required.
